Curriculum

14 Core Pharmacology Topics

Each topic contains Classification, Mechanism of Action (animated), Pharmacokinetics, Pharmacodynamics, Adverse Drug Reactions, Individual Drug Profiles, PPT Outline and NEET PG MCQs.

🔍 Clinical Tool

Drug Interaction Checker

200+ NEET PG & INI-CET high-yield drug interactions, severity-coded with mechanism, management & exam pearls.

💊 Check Two Drugs Instantly

Enter both drug names, get severity (🔴 Contraindicated / 🟠 Major / 🟡 Moderate / 🟢 Minor), mechanism, management plan and exam-ready summary.

📚 Clinical Pearl: Approx. 20-30% of hospital admissions in elderly are due to adverse drug interactions. Mastery of these combinations is essential for safe practice and high-yield NEET PG / INI-CET questions.
🔴 Contraindicated 🟠 Major 🟡 Moderate 🟢 Minor ⚪ No Known
⚡
⚡ Quick test with common combinations:
⚠️ Educational Use Only: This tool covers NEET PG / INI-CET / FMGE high-yield interactions for academic learning. Always verify with Lexicomp, Micromedex or UpToDate for real clinical decisions. Drug names: enter generic name (lowercase OK). 200+ pairs covered, not exhaustive.

About PharmaCraft

Crafted by an Educator

PharmaCraft is built and curated by Dr. Susheel Kumar, with a focus on clinical integration and exam-oriented teaching.

Our Mission

To make Pharmacology, often considered one of the most volume-heavy subjects in medicine, conceptual, visual and clinically meaningful. Every drug here is explained with mechanism animations, classification trees, side-by-side comparisons and exam-style MCQs so the student remembers how and why a drug works, not just the name.

Who is this for?

  • MBBS Students, revision before professional exams
  • NEET PG / INI-CET Aspirants, high-yield mock practice
  • FMGE Candidates, exam-pattern questions and quick recap
  • MD Pharmacology Residents, structured drug profiles for teaching
PharmaCraft
